prompt.task: Read the pdf file located at dataset/experiment_9/anton_2025.pdf and reproduce the results of the paper using Galaxy Tools. Upload the files and run the tools. The result must be exactly what was reported in the paper.

experiment_outputs.tool_name_1: Tool name used in Galaxy to perform Gene count matrices
experiment_outputs.analysis_result: Look the outputs generated from Galaxy tools and count how many genes with R2 = 0.98 and 100% direction agreement were found in the tool result in Galaxy
experiment_outputs.QC_step_detail: Which tool parameter used inside Galaxy allowed to filter the reads shorter than 15 bp. Look the tools used and the parameters passed to it.
